ksa_text: Knowledge of data subject rights fulfillment and management, including rights request intake procedures, response workflows, compliance timelines, documentation standards, and remediation processes for access, deletion, and rectification requests.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: Security & Privacy (affinity 0.42) with insufficient REG signals (2). Composite moderate-to-strong (0.4524). AI Lifecycle Manager interprets and applies regulatory requirements; does not build systems, deliver training curricula, or develop business cases.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 4 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Lifecycle Manager.
